tasks_completed: Create src/portfolio.py — PortfolioManager class with all required methods
learnings: Project uses .venv/bin/python (Python 3.14) — use that for tests, not system python3
pytest is installed in .venv; run with: .venv/bin/python -m pytest
Portfolio uses threading.Lock for thread safety; earn() calls _save() internally via the lock, so record_sale() must not hold the lock when calling earn()
